headline: Choose how you want to engage with the studio.
description: From clay sessions to canvas commissions, each path is shaped with the same material care and editorial finish.

items.title: Workshops & Classes
items.description: Learn hand-building, surface work, and studio rhythm in guided sessions for all levels.

image.alt: Atelier workspace prepared for a hands-on ceramics and painting session.

items.title: Private Events
items.description: Host team gatherings and celebrations with a premium creative studio experience.

image.alt: Creative atelier setting arranged for a private group event.

items.title: Gift Card
items.description: Give access to classes, original works, and bespoke studio moments.

image.alt: Giftable studio objects and artworks arranged in warm natural light.

items.title: Commissions
items.description: Collaborate on custom ceramics, original paintings, and site-specific studio work.

image.alt: Atelier materials and finished pieces for custom commission work.
